scripts.build-android-apk-dev-local: yarn prebuild-development && EAS_NO_VCS=1 dotenv -e .env.local -- eas build -p android --profile development-debug --clear-cache --local
scripts.build-android-prod-local: yarn prebuild-production && EAS_NO_VCS=1 dotenv -e .env.production -- eas build -p android --profile production --clear-cache --local
scripts.build-android-prod-apk-local: yarn prebuild-production && EAS_NO_VCS=1 dotenv -e .env.production -- eas build -p android --profile production-apk --clear-cache --local
scripts.build-ios-ipa-dev-local: yarn prebuild-development && EAS_NO_VCS=1 dotenv -e .env.local -- eas build -p ios --profile development-debug --clear-cache --local
scripts.build-ios-prod-local: yarn prebuild-production && TMPDIR=/private/tmp EAS_NO_VCS=1 dotenv -e .env.production -- eas build -p ios --profile production --clear-cache --local
scripts.build-android-apk-dev: yarn prebuild-development && dotenv -e .env.local -- eas build -p android --profile development-debug --clear-cache --no-wait
scripts.build-ios-ipa-dev: yarn prebuild-development && dotenv -e .env.local -- eas build -p ios --profile development-debug --clear-cache --no-wait
scripts.build-android-prod: yarn prebuild-production && dotenv -e .env.production -- eas build -p android --profile production --clear-cache --auto-submit --no-wait
scripts.build-ios-prod: yarn prebuild-production && dotenv -e .env.production -- eas build -p ios --profile production --clear-cache --auto-submit --no-wait
scripts.build-all-prod-local: yarn prebuild-production && EAS_NO_VCS=1 dotenv -e .env.production -- eas build -p android --profile production --clear-cache --local && EAS_NO_VCS=1 dotenv -e .env.production -- eas build -p ios --profile production --clear-cache --local
